response.justification: The candidate lacks the mandatory C++ experience on Windows, with only brief exposure to C/C++ during a short tenure at National Instruments. Additionally, there is no evidence of domain expertise in fixed income, investment banking, or capital markets, nor experience with SQL Server or Oracle. While the candidate demonstrates versatility across multiple languages and technologies, they do not meet the core technical and domain requirements for this role.
strengths: Strong multi-language proficiency across web, mobile, and embedded systems
Experience with CI/CD practices and modern software development methodologies
Proven ability to lead and mentor teams, as evidenced by workshops and open-source contributions
concerns: Insufficient C++ experience on Windows platform (mandatory requirement)
No demonstrated domain expertise in capital markets, investment banking, or fixed income
Lacks required SQL Server or Oracle experience
